message:
🐛 Stop injecting demo data on API failure in live mode (#2719)

When MCP API requests fail in live mode, catch blocks were
falling back to demo data (getDemoPods, getDemoServices, etc.)
without checking isDemoMode(). This caused realistic-looking
demo data to appear in the dashboard while connected to a real
cluster, misleading users into thinking it was real.

Remove demo data fallbacks from error handlers in:
- usePods, useAllPods, useDeploymentIssues (workloads.ts)
- useServices (networking.ts)
- useSecurityIssues (security.ts)
- useEvents, useWarningEvents (events.ts)
- useConfigMaps, useSecrets, useServiceAccounts (config.ts)

API failures now show error states or empty results. Demo data
is only injected when demo mode is explicitly active (checked
at the top of each refetch function).

Fixes #2647

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
